name: Apple Blueberry Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup (to 1 cup) fresh or frozen blueberries
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350°F.
2 Grease and flour a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
3 In a large bowl, beat margarine, sugar, and eggs until light and fluffy. Stir in apple sauce. Add flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt, stirring just until moistened.
4 Fold in blueberries. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5 Bake for 55 to 60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes. Then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
